title: STN's Superpowers Mod
description:
STN's Superpower Mod is a mod that adds superpowers!
For example: Superspeed, kinetic energy and even supersuits!
body:
STN's Superpower mod, is a mod that adds superpowers and supersuit to the game!
Power examples: Superspeed, Energy Absorbsion.
Plans for the mod:
A lot of powers with some having tiers,
A lot of customizable supersuits
And a lot more.
But why chose our mod? We got a few reasons:
1. Most superhero mods add powers that you aquire by putting on the suit, and most of the time in superhero comic books and movies it isn't how it's done. STN's Superpower mod changes that mechanic to making a kind of runes and activating them.
2. In most superhero mods you can't mix diffrent powers, but in this mod, you can!
3. We still are developing the mod, and just by downloading it you give us big support!
